description: Legal document, partnership. In Hebrew with business phrases in Judaeo-Arabic. Location: Cairo. Dated: 15 Adar II 5578 AM, which is 23 March 1818 CE. Partnership agreement between Mordekhay ha-Kohen and Avraham al-Vilda(?). The business is "the state collection of from the silk looms (anwāl) in the region east of Bilbays" (בשירות תקביץ מירי אלאנוואל פי שרקיית בילביס). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
